mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM AR_ITEM a LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON a.ITEM_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON a.ITEM_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON a.ITEM_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON a.ITEM_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko'
AND ( a.ITEM_NO LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' OR gen.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' OR gzh.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' OR gko.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' OR a.SHORT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' OR a.ITEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{itemNo} || '%' )
ORDER BY a.ORDERNO, a.ITEM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_ITEM ( ITEM_NO, SHORT_NAME, DESCRIPTION, UNIT, ITEM_GROUP_CODE, ITEM_ID_MAPPING, ITEM_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, ORDERNO_SST ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{shortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemGroupCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemIdMapping, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{updatedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ordernoSst, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE AR_ITEM
SHORT_NAME = #{shortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT = #{unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ITEM_GROUP_CODE = #{itemGroupCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ITEM_ID_MAPPING = #{itemIdMapping, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ITEM_ID = #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ORDERNO = #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ORDERNO_SST = #{ordernoSst, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}
